Complete Guide

27 Nakshatras: Complete Guide to Vedic Lunar Mansions

Discover the profound wisdom of the 27 Nakshatras in Vedic astrology. Learn about each lunar constellation's characteristics, ruling deity, and influence on personality and destiny.

20 min readUpdated: January 2025

TL;DR - Quick Summary

Nakshatras are 27 lunar mansions in Vedic astrology, each spanning 13°20' of the zodiac. Your birth Nakshatra (based on Moon's position) reveals your emotional nature, personality traits, and life path. Each Nakshatra has a ruling planet, deity, symbol, and unique characteristics. They're essential for marriage matching, muhurta selection, and the Vimshottari Dasha system.

Find Your NakshatraGenerate Kundli

Complete List of 27 Nakshatras

#NakshatraDegreesLordDeitySymbolGana
1Ashwiniअश्विनी0°00' - 13°20' AriesKetuAshwini KumarasHorse's HeadDeva
2Bharaniभरणी13°20' - 26°40' AriesVenusYamaYoniManushya
3Krittikaकृत्तिका26°40' Aries - 10°00' TaurusSunAgniRazor/FlameRakshasa
4Rohiniरोहिणी10°00' - 23°20' TaurusMoonBrahmaOx CartManushya
5Mrigashiraमृगशिरा23°20' Taurus - 6°40' GeminiMarsSomaDeer's HeadDeva
6Ardraआर्द्रा6°40' - 20°00' GeminiRahuRudraTeardropManushya
7Punarvasuपुनर्वसु20°00' Gemini - 3°20' CancerJupiterAditiBow and QuiverDeva
8Pushyaपुष्य3°20' - 16°40' CancerSaturnBrihaspatiCow's UdderDeva
9Ashleshaआश्लेषा16°40' - 30°00' CancerMercuryNagasCoiled SerpentRakshasa
10Maghaमघा0°00' - 13°20' LeoKetuPitris (Ancestors)Royal ThroneRakshasa
11Purva Phalguniपूर्व फाल्गुनी13°20' - 26°40' LeoVenusBhagaFront Legs of BedManushya
12Uttara Phalguniउत्तर फाल्गुनी26°40' Leo - 10°00' VirgoSunAryamanBack Legs of BedManushya
13Hastaहस्त10°00' - 23°20' VirgoMoonSavitarHandDeva
14Chitraचित्रा23°20' Virgo - 6°40' LibraMarsVishwakarmaBright JewelRakshasa
15Swatiस्वाति6°40' - 20°00' LibraRahuVayuYoung PlantDeva
16Vishakhaविशाखा20°00' Libra - 3°20' ScorpioJupiterIndra-AgniTriumphal ArchRakshasa
17Anuradhaअनुराधा3°20' - 16°40' ScorpioSaturnMitraLotusDeva
18Jyeshthaज्येष्ठा16°40' - 30°00' ScorpioMercuryIndraCircular AmuletRakshasa
19Mulaमूल0°00' - 13°20' SagittariusKetuNirritiBunch of RootsRakshasa
20Purva Ashadhaपूर्वाषाढ़ा13°20' - 26°40' SagittariusVenusApas (Water)Elephant TuskManushya
21Uttara Ashadhaउत्तराषाढ़ा26°40' Sagittarius - 10°00' CapricornSunVishvadevasElephant TuskManushya
22Shravanaश्रवण10°00' - 23°20' CapricornMoonVishnuThree FootprintsDeva
23Dhanishtaधनिष्ठा23°20' Capricorn - 6°40' AquariusMarsEight VasusDrumRakshasa
24Shatabhishaशतभिषा6°40' - 20°00' AquariusRahuVarunaEmpty CircleRakshasa
25Purva Bhadrapadaपूर्व भाद्रपद20°00' Aquarius - 3°20' PiscesJupiterAja EkapadaFront of Funeral CotManushya
26Uttara Bhadrapadaउत्तर भाद्रपद3°20' - 16°40' PiscesSaturnAhir BudhnyaBack of Funeral CotManushya
27Revatiरेवती16°40' - 30°00' PiscesMercuryPushanFish/DrumDeva

Detailed Nakshatra Descriptions

1

Ashwini

अश्विनी

Lord:Ketu
Deity:Ashwini Kumaras

Quick, energetic, healing abilities, pioneering spirit, independent nature

2

Bharani

भरणी

Lord:Venus
Deity:Yama

Creative, nurturing, transformative, determined, passionate

3

Krittika

कृत्तिका

Lord:Sun
Deity:Agni

Sharp intellect, purifying nature, leadership, courage, determination

4

Rohini

रोहिणी

Lord:Moon
Deity:Brahma

Beautiful, artistic, sensual, materialistic, grounded

5

Mrigashira

मृगशिरा

Lord:Mars
Deity:Soma

Curious, searching, gentle, sensual, artistic

6

Ardra

आर्द्रा

Lord:Rahu
Deity:Rudra

Intellectual, transformative, destructive-creative, intense

7

Punarvasu

पुनर्वसु

Lord:Jupiter
Deity:Aditi

Optimistic, philosophical, nurturing, returning, expansive

8

Pushya

पुष्य

Lord:Saturn
Deity:Brihaspati

Nourishing, protective, traditional, spiritual, generous

9

Ashlesha

आश्लेषा

Lord:Mercury
Deity:Nagas

Mystical, hypnotic, cunning, intuitive, transformative

Find Your Nakshatra

Understanding Nakshatra Groups

Deva Gana (Divine)

Gentle, spiritual, and benevolent nature. Good for spiritual pursuits.

AshwiniMrigashiraPunarvasuPushyaHastaSwatiAnuradhaShravanaRevati

Manushya Gana (Human)

Balanced nature with both material and spiritual interests.

BharaniRohiniPurva PhalguniUttara PhalguniPurva AshadhaUttara AshadhaPurva BhadrapadaUttara Bhadrapada

Rakshasa Gana (Demon)

Intense, powerful, and transformative. Strong willpower.

KrittikaAshleshaMaghaChitraVishakhaJyeshthaMulaDhanishtaShatabhisha
